main_character.name: Detective Elias Thorne
main_character.description: A weary, 40-year-old male detective with dark circles under his eyes, a scruffy beard, wearing a rumpled grey trench coat and a loose tie. Cinematic moody lighting.

plot_summary: Elias has uncovered a disturbing effigy and a pulsating, glowing root beneath the floorboards of the desolate cottage, just as a malevolent entity's whisper confirms his partner found the "source." The floorboards beneath him are now actively splintering and buckling, threatening to plunge him into the darkness below.
previous_events: Episode 1: Elias has just arrived in the perpetually overcast town of Oakhaven, where the sun hasn't been seen in 5 years. He is looking for his missing partner.

Episode 2: Elias Thorne is frozen in terror, an unseen entity whispering directly behind him in the desolate cottage, revealing a chilling detail about his missing partner's discovery. He must now confront what is lurking in the shadows and beneath the floorboards.
